name: deep-agents-example
description: Deep Agents (TypeScript) で Mastra OSS を多観点監査するデモ実装

scripts.test: npm run test:shell && npm run test:ts
scripts.test:orchestrator: bash scripts/ralph/orchestrator.sh --dry-run && bash scripts/ralph/test-orchestrator-status.sh && bash scripts/ralph/test-ralph-complete-signal.sh && bash scripts/ralph/test-ralph-cli.sh && bash scripts/ralph/test-prd-helpers.sh && bash scripts/ralph/test-orchestrator-execution.sh
scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run test:doc-contracts && npm run test:orchestrator && npm run test:repo-lint && npm run lint:repo
